fixes_applied.fix_applied: Removed unused `import type { ChatMessage }` line

fixes_applied.original_issue: Three any casts for Web Speech API (onerror, onresult, maxAlternatives) — needs .d.ts declaration
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires creating a web-speech.d.ts with SpeechRecognition/SpeechRecognitionEvent types. Low risk but broader scope.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires creating a new .d.ts type declaration file with multiple Web Speech API interfaces. Medium scope change, better addressed in a dedicated PR.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Two any casts for piper-tts-web voice ID type + duplicate OPFS iteration code
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — @mintplex-labs/piper-tts-web types are incomplete. Would need a .d.ts override or upstream fix.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Third-party library (@mintplex-labs/piper-tts-web) has incomplete type definitions. Fixing requires a local .d.ts module augmentation which is fragile to library updates.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Record<string, any> for dnd-kit drag handle listeners
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — SyntheticListenerMap is not cleanly exported from @dnd-kit/core public API (only from dist/hooks/utilities internal path).
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: The SyntheticListenerMap type is only available from an internal dist path (@dnd-kit/core/dist/hooks/utilities), not from the public package exports. Using internal paths would break on library updates.

fixes_applied.original_issue: private pipelineInstance: any — untyped pipeline instance
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — @huggingface/transformers pipeline return type is complex and version-dependent.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: The pipeline return type from @huggingface/transformers is a complex generic that varies by task type. A minimal interface would be fragile to library updates.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Project colors defined twice (array and label map) could drift
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — structural refactoring of a shared config that affects multiple consumers.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Refactoring the color definition to a single source would change the export shape used by AddProjectModal, Sidebar, and other components. Better as a dedicated change.

fixes_applied.original_issue: LM Studio default base URL hardcoded in 8 locations across 3 files
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires coordinating changes across backend adapters, API routes, and frontend API layer.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: The URL constant appears in backend (lmstudio.ts), API routes (api/ai.ts), and frontend (ui/api/ai/ai-providers.ts). Extracting requires a shared constant accessible from all layers.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Ollama default base URL hardcoded in two places within the same file
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — same pattern as LM Studio URL duplication. Better to fix both together.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Should be fixed alongside the LM Studio URL extraction as part of a consistent default-URLs refactoring.

fixes_applied.original_issue: plugin.instance as any — blanket any cast for plugin instance methods
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires defining a PluginInstanceMethods interface with optional methods, changing LoadedPlugin type.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Already deferred in round 1. Requires interface design work across the plugin lifecycle system.

summary: Fixed all 3 CRITICAL issues (console.log removal, regex deduplication, any type fix), 10 WARNING issues (silent catches, any casts, double cast removal, ChatMessage type extension), and 6 SUGGESTION issues (stale TODO removal, plugin error type consistency). Deferred 8 items that require broader architectural changes or third-party type workarounds. All 2469 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean (0 errors, 73 pre-existing warnings).
